expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs comment PROJ-123 with markdown-formatted body
expectations.evidence: Exact Command: 'node .../jira.mjs comment DO-123 "**Status Update**\n\nKey findings..."'
Comment body contains '**Status Update**' and approach states: '**Bold text**: **Status Update** -- renders as bold heading-like text'

expectations.text: Comment body contains a bullet list (- items)
expectations.evidence: Comment body contains '- The root cause has been identified...' and two more bullet items
Comment body contains '\`auth.config.ts\`' for inline code

expectations.text: marklassian converts the comment body to valid ADF (not raw markdown)
expectations.evidence: 'Calls markdownToAdf() from the marklassian library to convert markdown into Atlassian Document Format (ADF)' and 'marklassian parses the markdown using marked and produces a valid ADF document node tree'

expectations.text: The comment renders correctly in Jira with proper formatting
expectations.evidence: Describes the resulting ADF structure: 'paragraph node with a strong mark for the bold text', 'bulletList node with listItem children', 'text node with a code mark for the inline code snippet'
